entries.notes: Legacy registry path retained for compatibility tooling only.
entries.reason: Governance deprecations moved to canonical data/governance path.

entries.notes: Legacy schema location remains for migration-only compatibility.
entries.reason: Deprecation schema moved under governance namespace.

entries.notes: Migrate interaction dispatch to emit ControlIntent only.
entries.reason: Intent envelope construction must be centralized in control plane gateway.

entries.notes: Use PlanIntent for ghost flow and ExecuteIntent for commitment/process flow.
entries.reason: Legacy path mixes planning/execution dispatch outside unified control policy.

entries.notes: Keep deterministic CLI surface but route through control plane APIs.
entries.reason: CLI command execution must pass through control policy/proof log pipeline.

entries.notes: Observation should consume resolved view policy outcome rather than embed bypass logic.
entries.reason: Freecam/special view bypass checks must be policy-resolved by control/view policy.

entries.notes: Unify civ override handling with meta-law override contract.
entries.reason: Admin overrides must be explicit AL4 control intents with exception/proof logging.

entries.notes: Retain test-only usage while migrating non-net call sites.
entries.reason: Envelope construction should be restricted to net ingress and control plane.

entries.notes: Window actions become control-intent producers only.
entries.reason: UI host should not execute process intents directly outside control plane.
